generation.style_prompt: cinematic 2nd-Renaissance aesthetic, monumental painterly compositions fusing classical Renaissance grandeur with near-future ambition, golden-hour amber light on cathedrals frescoes and orbital structures, soft volumetric god-rays, warm cream and sepia midtones over deep velvet-black shadow, oil-painting brushwork meets photoreal scale, hopeful and reverent, cinematic anamorphic framing
